completions.label: System.out.println
completions.detail: Print to standard output with newline

completions.label: System.out.print
completions.detail: Print to standard output without newline

completions.label: System.err.println
completions.detail: Print to standard error with newline

documentation.value:
Ensures that reads and writes to the variable are visible across threads, preventing caching in CPU registers.

```java
private volatile boolean running = true;
```

Marks a field to be excluded from serialization.

```java
private transient int cachedValue;
```

Restricts which classes can extend or implement the declared type.

```java
public sealed class Shape permits Circle, Rectangle, Triangle { }
```

Specifies the allowed subclasses of a sealed class.

```java
public sealed class Shape permits Circle, Rectangle { }
```

Compares this string to another string, ignoring case differences.

```java
if (input.equalsIgnoreCase("yes")) { }
```

completions.label: .contains()
completions.detail: Check if string contains a sequence

completions.label: .startsWith()
completions.detail: Check if string starts with prefix

documentation.value:
Tests if this string starts with the specified prefix.

```java
if (url.startsWith("https://")) { }
```

completions.label: .endsWith()
completions.detail: Check if string ends with suffix

documentation.value:
Tests if this string ends with the specified suffix.

```java
if (file.endsWith(".java")) { }
```

Returns a string with leading and trailing whitespace (char <= ' ') removed.

```java
String clean = input.trim();
```

Returns a string with all leading and trailing Unicode whitespace removed. Preferred over trim() for Unicode support (Java 11+).

```java
String clean = input.strip();
```

Converts all characters to upper case using the rules of the default locale.

```java
String upper = str.toUpperCase();
```

Converts all characters to lower case using the rules of the default locale.

```java
String lower = str.toLowerCase();
```

Returns true if length() is 0.

```java
if (str.isEmpty()) { }
```

Returns true if the string is empty or contains only whitespace characters.

```java
if (str.isBlank()) { }
"   ".isBlank(); // true
```

Returns an unmodifiable list containing the elements of the given collection.

```java
List<String> copy = List.copyOf(mutableList);
```

Returns an unmodifiable view of the specified list.

```java
List<String> readOnly = Collections.unmodifiableList(mutableList);
```

Returns a fixed-size list backed by the specified array.

```java
List<String> list = Arrays.asList("a", "b", "c");
```

Returns a sequential Stream with the specified array as its source.

```java
Arrays.stream(arr).filter(x -> x > 0).forEach(System.out::println);
```

Returns an unmodifiable map containing the specified key-value pairs.

```java
Map<String, Integer> map = Map.of("a", 1, "b", 2);
```

Returns an unmodifiable set containing the specified elements.

```java
Set<String> set = Set.of("a", "b", "c");
```

Returns a stream consisting of elements that match the given predicate.

```java
list.stream().filter(s -> s.length() > 3)
list.stream().filter(Objects::nonNull)
```

Returns a stream with each element transformed by the given function.

```java
list.stream().map(String::toUpperCase)
list.stream().map(x -> x * 2)
```

Returns a stream where each element is replaced with the contents of a mapped stream.

```java
list.stream().flatMap(Collection::stream)
list.stream().flatMap(s -> Arrays.stream(s.split(",")))
```

completions.label: .reduce()
completions.detail: Reduce stream to a single value

documentation.value:
Returns a stream with elements sorted in natural order or by a comparator.

```java
list.stream().sorted()
list.stream().sorted(Comparator.comparing(Person::name))
```

Returns a stream with distinct elements (by Object.equals).

```java
List<Integer> unique = list.stream().distinct().toList();
```

Returns a stream consisting of at most maxSize elements.

```java
list.stream().limit(10).forEach(System.out::println);
```

Returns a stream with the first n elements discarded.

```java
list.stream().skip(5).forEach(System.out::println);
```

Returns the count of elements in the stream.

```java
long n = list.stream().filter(x -> x > 0).count();
```

Returns an Optional describing the first element, or empty if the stream is empty.

```java
Optional<String> first = list.stream().filter(s -> s.startsWith("A")).findFirst();
```

Returns an Optional describing some element of the stream. May return any match in parallel streams.

```java
Optional<String> any = list.parallelStream().filter(s -> s.length() > 3).findAny();
```

Returns whether any element matches the provided predicate.

```java
boolean hasNegative = list.stream().anyMatch(x -> x < 0);
```

Returns whether all elements match the provided predicate.

```java
boolean allPositive = list.stream().allMatch(x -> x > 0);
```

Returns whether no elements match the provided predicate.

```java
boolean noNulls = list.stream().noneMatch(Objects::isNull);
```

Returns a Collector that accumulates elements into a new List.

```java
List<String> result = stream.collect(Collectors.toList());
```

Returns a Collector that accumulates elements into a Map.

```java
Map<String, Integer> map = items.stream()
    .collect(Collectors.toMap(Item::name, Item::price));
```

Returns a Collector that groups elements by a classifier function.

```java
Map<String, List<Person>> byCity = people.stream()
    .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(Person::city));
```

Returns an Optional describing the specified non-null value. Throws NullPointerException if value is null.

```java
Optional<String> opt = Optional.of("hello");
```

completions.label: Optional.ofNullable
completions.detail: Create Optional that may be null

documentation.value:
Returns an Optional describing the value, or empty if null.

```java
Optional<String> opt = Optional.ofNullable(getValue());
```

Returns an empty Optional instance.

```java
Optional<String> opt = Optional.empty();
```

Returns the value if present, otherwise invokes the supplier and returns its result.

```java
String name = opt.orElseGet(() -> computeDefault());
```

A Future that can be explicitly completed, composed, and combined for asynchronous programming.

```java
CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> fetchData())
    .thenApply(data -> process(data))
    .thenAccept(result -> System.out.println(result));
```

Creates a thread pool that reuses a fixed number of threads.

```java
ExecutorService pool = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors());
```

completions.label: Files.readAllLines
completions.detail: Read all lines from a file

documentation.value:
Reads all lines from a file as a List of Strings.

```java
List<String> lines = Files.readAllLines(Path.of("data.txt"));
```

completions.label: Math.max
completions.detail: Return the greater of two values

completions.label: Math.min
completions.detail: Return the smaller of two values

documentation.value:
Returns the smaller of two values.

```java
int min = Math.min(a, b);
```

Returns the absolute value of the argument.

```java
int pos = Math.abs(-5); // 5
double d = Math.abs(-3.14); // 3.14
```

Returns the correctly rounded positive square root of a double value.

```java
double root = Math.sqrt(16); // 4.0
```

Returns the value of the first argument raised to the power of the second argument.

```java
double result = Math.pow(2, 10); // 1024.0
```

Returns an Integer object holding the value of the specified String.

```java
Integer num = Integer.valueOf("42");
Integer cached = Integer.valueOf(127); // uses cache
```

Returns a new double initialized to the value represented by the specified String.

```java
double d = Double.parseDouble("3.14");
```

Checks that the specified object reference is not null, throws NullPointerException if it is.

```java
this.name = Objects.requireNonNull(name, "name must not be null");
```
